title: pyrus × auricularis
intro: Pyrus × auricularis, also known as the Cherry Plum or Wild Plum, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Pyrus communis and Prunus domestica species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus × auricularis include its potential to support digestive health, lower cholesterol levels, and reduce the risk of certain cardiovascular diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant's fruit, leaves, and bark are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat various health issues.
